faction_balance_targets.druides: CAPPED at 15% (was target 20%) — max 3 cards per 20-batch
faction_balance_targets.ankou: BOOSTED to 20% minimum — min 4 cards per 20-batch
faction_balance_targets.niamh: SLIGHT BOOST to 25% target for water/healing counterweight

changes.added_section: faction_cards_per_20_batch with per-faction min/max/target card counts

rationale: Cycle 11 playtester found druides at ~31% of rep effects across 166 templates (target was 20%). Capping at 15% with hard max 3 cards/batch corrects the drift. Boosting ankou to 20% minimum adds mortality/fate tension that pairs with T038 difficulty scaling. niamh healing boost creates strategic choice: lean into healing to offset scaling drain.
